title: Rose Gold Happy Birthday Banner, Bunting Birthday Decorations for Girls and Women with 12 Latex Balloons - Perfect for Birthday Parties
features: What You Get: happy birthday decorations set contains: 1 x Happy Birthday Banner, 1 happy birthday bunting, 6 x Confetti Balloons, 6x rose gold latex happy birthday balloons , a great value set to decorate your birthday party.

Premium Quality: The birthday banners for girls is made of cardboard, which can be reused without damage during use. The birthday balloons are made of latex, which is highly malleable and not easy to break. The exquisite birthday decorations will give you a unique birthday.

Eye-Catching happy birthday Decor: The birthday decoration for girls pack is mainly rose gold, dazzling and shining. The birthday banners are placed in the middle, and the surrounding can be decorated with birthday bunting and balloons, to make the whole birthday party more complete and shiny.

Easy To Use: The birthday banner and birthday bunting need to be assembled by yourself, just thread through the holes in the card. Balloons can be inflated with helium, which you can use to tie up with string or stick to the wall.The birthday banners for women are good for birthday party decorations

All Ages Valid: This birthday party decorations has no age-restricted, suitable for all ages (1st 2th 16th 18th 21st 25th 30th 50th 60th ect), this rose gold birthday decoration creates a romantic and sweet atmosphere, giving you a sparkling birthday.
